common.name: Name
common.chart_demo_desc: Sample monthly volume until real data is connected.

layout.nav_vacations_pending_aria: Leave: {{count}} recent notice(s) for days added
layout.nav_my_profile_pending_aria: Your profile change request is awaiting review

login.title: Inorme back office
login.subtitle: Sign in with your corporate account. ADMIN and worker roles have different permissions.
login.password_hint: Use the eye icon to see what you type and avoid typos.
login.env_step3_mid: add a line like this (no quotes or spaces around the
login.env_prod_intro: In production, variables are baked in at build time (Vite). A .env file on the server is not enough: set them in your host’s dashboard (e.g. Vercel) and redeploy.
login.env_prod_step2: Add for Production (and Preview if needed):
login.env_prod_step4: Save, then Redeploy the latest deployment (or push a new commit). Without a new build, the app will still lack those keys.

passwordChange.title: New password
passwordChange.description: For security you must choose a new password. Login passwords are never stored in plain text; only you know yours.

contactSubmissions.title: Website contact messages
contactSubmissions.subtitle: Messages sent from the public contact form.

auth.email_not_confirmed: Your email is not confirmed yet. Check your inbox or, in Supabase → Authentication → Providers → Email, turn off “Confirm email” for development.
auth.user_banned: This account is blocked. Check the user in Supabase → Authentication → Users.
auth.invalid_credentials: Incorrect email or password. If you just created the user in Supabase, check the password or use “Reset password” in the dashboard.
auth.too_many_requests: Too many attempts. Wait a few minutes or reset the password in Supabase.
auth.no_user_after_login: Could not get the user after signing in.
auth.profile_load_error: Could not load the profile from Supabase.
auth.no_profile: There is no row in the «backoffice_users» table for this user. In Supabase: run migration SQL and insert into public.backoffice_users with your email and auth_user_id, or create the user under Administration → Users.
auth.account_disabled: Your account is disabled. Contact an administrator.

dashboard.worker_intro_end: you can open the sections you are allowed to use.
dashboard.worker_permissions: If you need more permissions, contact an administrator.
dashboard.worker_timeclock_hint: Informational summary. Use Time clock to record in/out or breaks.
dashboard.worker_timeclock_error: Could not load time clock status.
dashboard.worker_timeclock_pause_no_comment: Break active with no reason text on record.
dashboard.worker_agenda_hint: What’s on your calendar this week (Monday to Sunday).
dashboard.worker_agenda_friday_preview_hint: On Fridays we show a preview of the week ahead.
dashboard.worker_agenda_empty: Nothing scheduled in your agenda this week.
dashboard.worker_expenses_hint: This month’s sheet: status, total, and quick access.
dashboard.worker_expenses_empty_month: No sheet for this month yet. Open Expenses to start.
dashboard.worker_agenda_no_profile: No worker profile is linked to your account.
dashboard.admin_subtitle: Inorme back office overview: users, clients, projects, suppliers and staff.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Create and manage projects: client, dates, team (workers and role on the project), documentation.
projects.load_error_hint: 1) In Supabase → SQL Editor, run «supabase/migrations/20260206140000_projects.sql». 2) If you see «schema cache» but tables already exist, run «supabase/RELOAD_PGRST_SCHEMA.sql» (NOTIFY only). 3) In Project Settings → Data API, ensure the «public» schema is exposed.
projects.delete_desc_suffix: and all attached files. This cannot be undone.
projects.dialog_desc: Project details, assigned team and attachments.
projects.field_final_hint: Optional. Only when the contracting client is an intermediary.
projects.team_hint: Assign staff members and their role on this project. The same person can be on several projects with a different role.
projects.docs_hint: Attach files after creating the project or while editing. Requires the «project-documents» Storage bucket in Supabase.

workCalendars.title: Work calendars
workCalendars.subtitle: Manage work sites (you can add new sites from Barcelona’s calendar). Per year and site: holidays, summer schedule and annual view. Each holiday can be national, regional or local.
workCalendars.card_desc: Pick a site and add or import holidays. You can export Excel to CSV (UTF-8) and paste it here.
workCalendars.year_view_desc: Mon–Thu: 8.75 h (white). Fri and summer schedule days: 7 h (green). Weekends in peach; holidays by scope.
workCalendars.summer_card_desc: Define date ranges (start and end inclusive). In the annual view, Monday–Friday within each range show green (7 h); Saturday and Sunday are not marked green for summer. If a day is a public holiday, the holiday colour takes priority.
workCalendars.summer_empty: No summer schedule ranges for this site and year.
workCalendars.summer_import_help: One range per line: start_date;end_date or start_date,end_date (YYYY-MM-DD or DD/MM/YYYY). Lines starting with # are ignored.
workCalendars.summer_delete_desc: 7 h intensive will no longer apply in the visual calendar for those dates.
workCalendars.empty: No holidays for this site and year.
workCalendars.import_help: One line per holiday. Date: YYYY-MM-DD or DD/MM/YYYY. Optional description and, at the end, type: national, regional (or autonomic), or local (default: national).
workCalendars.import_placeholder:
2025-01-01, New Year, national
2025-09-11, Diada, regional
2025-06-24; local
workCalendars.error_duplicate_holiday: A holiday already exists on that date for this site. Pick another date or remove the duplicate.
workCalendars.delete_desc: It will be removed from this site's work calendar.
workCalendars.load_hint: Run calendar migrations in order in Supabase (including «20260206200000_work_calendar_summer_days.sql»; if you had the old one-day-per-row table, «20260206210000_work_calendar_summer_migrate_day_to_range.sql»). If you see «date_start does not exist», also apply «20260206220000_work_calendar_summer_days_schema_repair.sql». See supabase/CALENDARIOS_LABORALES_APLICAR.md.
workCalendars.sites_card_desc: Add sites by copying holidays and summer schedules from Barcelona. Default vacation days apply when assigning workers.
workCalendars.sites_new_desc: All holidays and summer ranges currently stored for Barcelona will be copied. You can then adjust them per tab.
workCalendars.sites_edit_desc: Display name and annual vacation reference for this site.
workCalendars.sites_edit_vacation_sync_hint: When you save, every worker assigned to this site gets this annual allowance (including the Vacations admin view).
workCalendars.sites_delete_desc: Holidays and summer ranges for this site will be removed. No workers may be assigned to it.

clients.title: Clients
clients.subtitle: Create and manage clients: tax data, type (end customer or intermediary) and contact persons per company.
clients.search_ph: Search by name, tax ID, email, end client…
clients.empty_filter: No clients match filters or search.
clients.delete_desc_suffix: and all contact persons. This cannot be undone.

providers.title: Suppliers
providers.subtitle: External companies (contractors, subcontractors, etc.) with the same onboarding data as a client: tax, contact and contact persons.
providers.delete_desc_suffix: Linked staff will no longer have a company assigned (subcontractor / self-employed via company).

workers.title: Staff
workers.subtitle: People working for the company. Subcontractors and self-employed via a company are linked to a
workers.field_calendar_desc: Public holidays and summer hours for the assigned site.
workers.field_vacation_days_desc: Only administrators can change this. When switching site, adjust the number according to internal policy.
workers.delete_desc: This will remove the record for
workers.delete_blocked: This person has a login under Users. Remove or change that account first.

users.title: Back office users
users.subtitle: Each account is linked to a
users.subtitle_mid: (data under Staff). Here you set login email, password and role (administrator or worker). Credentials are managed with
users.card_desc: It comes from the record in
users.card_desc_end: . When creating a user you pick the person; the default login email is from that record (you can change it).
users.validation_worker_admin: An administrator must be linked to a staff profile.
users.dialog_edit_desc: Credentials, role and staff profile. Personal data is synced from Staff when you pick or change the profile.
users.edit_worker_help_admin: Required for administrators: this is the profile used for personal data (vacations, agenda, time clock, etc.).
users.edit_worker_help_worker: Recommended. Legacy accounts may have no profile; you can link one or leave unlinked.
users.edit_worker_none_available: No profiles available to link. Create or activate a staff member first.
users.password_optional_refine: At least 8 characters if you set a password
users.edit_password_refine: At least 8 characters if you change the password
users.password_optional_help: If left empty, a secure temporary password is generated and shown once after the user is created.
users.initial_password_desc: Share it over a secure channel. The user must change it on first sign-in. It will not be shown again.
users.password_not_visible: For security, passwords are not stored in plain text—only a hash exists in Supabase Auth. The initial password is shown only once when you create the user; to restore access use “Force password change” or reset in the Supabase dashboard.
users.force_change_desc: On next sign-in they must choose a new password:
users.toast_force_change: They will be asked to change password on next sign-in.
users.empty_filter: No users match filters or search.
users.toast_self_delete: You cannot delete your own account while signed in.
users.toast_last_admin_role: You cannot remove administrator from the only admin.
users.toast_last_admin_deactivate: You cannot deactivate the only administrator.
users.delete_desc_suffix: The staff record is not deleted. The Auth user may need manual removal in Supabase.

usersBulk.title: Bulk user creation
usersBulk.subtitle: Only active staff without a login account are listed. Each account uses the email from the staff record. Everyone shares the same initial password and must change it on first sign-in.
usersBulk.options_desc: The default initial password is «12345678». You can change it here before running the batch. Role is usually worker.
usersBulk.password_hint: At least 8 characters. Applied to everyone selected.
usersBulk.empty_all_have_user: Every active staff member already has a login.
usersBulk.none_selected: Select at least one staff member.
usersBulk.result_desc: Share the initial password over a secure channel. Each person must change it when they sign in.

vacations.title: Annual leave
vacations.subtitle: Per worker: assigned site, current annual allowance from the record, days booked in the selected year and remaining. If the previous calendar year had unused days against the same allowance, a note is shown.
vacations.card_desc: The annual allowance is the current «vacation days» value on the staff record; if it changed in the past, figures for earlier years are indicative only.
vacations.allowance_invalid: Enter a valid number between 0 and 365.
vacations.load_error: Could not load the leave summary.
vacations.notifications_desc: Whenever a worker adds a leave day in their calendar, it is logged here for administrators to review.

workerProfile.title: My profile
workerProfile.subtitle: View your personal details and request changes. An administrator will review your request; if approved, your staff record will be updated.
workerProfile.no_worker_link: Your account has no linked staff record. If it should, contact an administrator.
workerProfile.pending_banner_desc: You already have a change request pending. You can submit another after it is resolved.
workerProfile.form_desc: Edit the fields you want to change and add an optional message for the administrator. Changes apply only after approval.
workerProfile.toast_sent: Request sent. An administrator will review it.
workerProfile.calendar_desc: Assigned office (public holidays and summer hours). You can change it here when appropriate; the update is saved immediately.
workerProfile.vacation_days_hint: (only administrators can change this under Workers). Changing site applies the new site’s default days.

workerMyCalendar.title: Work calendar & annual leave
workerMyCalendar.subtitle: View your site’s calendar (public holidays and summer hours) and mark the days you will take as leave. You cannot exceed the annual allowance on your record.
workerMyCalendar.summary_site_unknown: Could not load the site name.
workerMyCalendar.grid_desc: Click a working day (not a weekend or public holiday) to add or remove leave. Days highlighted in blue are already booked.
workerMyCalendar.grid_past_locked: Past enjoyed days appear crossed out and cannot be modified.
workerMyCalendar.load_error: Could not load the calendar or leave data.
workerMyCalendar.pending_desc: Your proposal for this year is under admin review. You cannot send another one until it is resolved.
workerMyCalendar.request_desc: Mark in the calendar the days you want (add/remove against approved days) and submit the request for validation.
workerMyCalendar.error_limit: You cannot propose more than {{max}} days.

vacationRequests.title: Leave requests
vacationRequests.subtitle: Review worker proposals and approve or reject them. Approved leave is only updated after approval.
vacationRequests.reject_desc: Proposed changes will be discarded and not applied to approved leave.
vacationRequests.toast_rejected: Request rejected and proposed changes discarded.

messages.title: Messages
messages.subtitle: Internal inbox for notices and conversations.
messages.admin_subtitle: Start conversations and reply in worker threads.
messages.admin_new_thread_desc: Pick a worker and write subject + message.
messages.system_thread_no_reply: This system thread does not support replies.
messages.admin_search_worker_placeholder: Search by first name, last name or email…
messages.admin_search_threads_placeholder: Search by recipient, subject or content…

timeClock.worker_subtitle: Clock in/out, breaks during your shift, or a full-day absence.
timeClock.admin_subtitle: Review worker history, monthly totals, and manual adjustments.
timeClock.worker_search_placeholder: Search by first name, last name, email, ID…
timeClock.select_worker_hint: Select a worker to load the records.
timeClock.worker_section_journey_desc: Clock in when you start and clock out when you finish. The note below is optional.
timeClock.worker_section_pause_desc: Use this if you step away for a while (coffee, lunch, errand…). Starting a break requires a short reason.
timeClock.worker_section_absence_desc: Only if you will not clock in or out today. It cannot be combined with other records the same day.
timeClock.worker_absence_optional_note_placeholder: Extra detail for admin if needed…
timeClock.worker_status_a11y_label: Your time clock status for today
timeClock.worker_today_log_empty: No time records yet for today.
timeClock.worker_hint_pause_need_clock_in: Clock in first to use breaks.
timeClock.worker_hint_pause_need_reason: Enter the break reason above to start a break.
timeClock.worker_hint_absence_locked: There are already records today: full-day absence is not available.
timeClock.absence_reason_placeholder: E.g. sick leave, paid leave, personal matter…
timeClock.comment_placeholder: Optional note for this time record
timeClock.request_fix_desc: If you forgot to clock or there is an error, send a request to admin.
timeClock.request_fix_placeholder: Describe what needs to be corrected…
timeClock.history_desc: You can view submitted records but cannot edit them.
timeClock.events_collapsed_hint: Daily summary view. Expand a day to view or edit details.
timeClock.clock_in_ip_hint: Public IP of the device when clocking in (admin only).
timeClock.delete_day_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete all records for {{day}}?
timeClock.empty: No time records for this period.
timeClock.toast_save_error: Could not save the time record.
timeClock.toast_delete_error: Could not delete the time record.
timeClock.request_fix_day_empty: No time records for that day.
timeClock.requests_subtitle: Open each request, approve or reject it, and delete it only when you decide.
timeClock.requests_load_error: Could not load time clock requests.
timeClock.request_review_note_placeholder: Optional note to keep on this review...
timeClock.reports_subtitle: Generate PDF reports by period, workers, and absences.
timeClock.reports_filters_desc: Define period and workers to compute hours and absences.
timeClock.reports_no_absences: No absences recorded for this period.

agenda.worker_subtitle: Public holidays, leave, special hours from your assigned work calendar, plus your own entries.
agenda.admin_subtitle: Review each person’s calendar context and add notes that appear on their agenda.
agenda.grid_desc: Colours show public holidays, summer hours, approved leave, and days with agenda entries.
agenda.admin_grid_desc: Same view as the worker, including your admin notes.
agenda.list_desc: Reminders, events and meetings; administrator notes are highlighted.
agenda.admin_list_desc: Entries for the range that matches the current view (year, month or week).
agenda.toast_todo_done: Task marked complete. The administrator has been notified.
agenda.admin_entry_desc: Choose a type (comment, note, meeting, event, to-do, etc.). Administrator entries are highlighted.
agenda.no_worker_profile: Your worker profile could not be found.
agenda.admin_note_desc: It will appear on their agenda highlighted as an administrator note.

expenses.title: Expenses
expenses.subtitle: Enter amounts by category day by day, save your draft, and at the end of the period submit the sheet for admin validation. When teams and managers are defined, the submission flow can be extended.
expenses.no_access: You do not have the expenses module enabled or no worker profile is linked.
expenses.open_period_desc: Choose a full month or a specific date range. One sheet exists per period (you can reopen it from history).
expenses.toast_period_open: Sheet ready. You can enter expenses and save.
expenses.totals_hint: Totals are calculated automatically. Use dot or comma as decimal separator.
expenses.observations_placeholder: Notes for your manager or admin…
expenses.toast_submitted: Sheet submitted. Admin will review it.
expenses.history_desc: All your sheets by period and status.
expenses.history_empty: No sheets yet. Open a period above to start.
expenses.admin_subtitle: Validate submitted sheets. Pending items appear under “Pending validation”.
expenses.admin_list_desc: Open the detail view to review amounts by day and category and any notes; validate or reject from there.
expenses.detail_desc: Review daily amounts by category before approving or rejecting.
expenses.detail_readonly_hint: This sheet is no longer pending validation.
expenses.reject_dialog_desc: The worker will see this reason and can correct the sheet.
expenses.admin_toast_rejected: Sheet rejected. The worker can correct and resubmit.
expenses.reject_reason_placeholder: State what to fix or attach…
expenses.pdf_open_error: Could not open the PDF. Check storage bucket and permissions.
expenses.pdf_missing_hint: This sheet is approved but no PDF is stored (legacy data).
expenses.attachments_help: Upload PDFs or photos of receipts while you fill in the sheet. Optionally link each file to a day, or leave as applying to the whole period. When you submit, these files are available to administration.
expenses.attachments_admin_hint: Receipts provided by the worker with this sheet (PDF or image).
expenses.attachments_camera_dialog_desc: Allow camera access if your browser asks. On a laptop this is usually the built-in webcam.
expenses.attachments_camera_error_permission: Could not access the camera. Check site permissions in the address bar.
expenses.attachments_camera_error_generic: The camera could not be used. Try reloading or use “Upload files” to pick a photo.
expenses.attachments_camera_unsupported: This browser cannot use the camera here. Use “Upload files” instead.
expenses.attachments_camera_fallback_files: I’d rather pick a file from my device…

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Client invoices with sequential numbering, audit trail, chained hash and VeriFactu-ready QR.
billing.issuer_desc: Register each group company: sequential numbering and hash chain are per issuer.
billing.issuer_logo_help: PNG or JPEG, max 2 MB. Shown top-right on proforma and issued invoice PDFs.
billing.issuer_logo_after_save: Save the issuer first; then you can upload a logo.
billing.issuer_privacy_footer_help: Optional. For issuer INORME (tax ID B60340601) a fixed RGPD notice is used in the PDF; you do not need to fill this in. Other issuers can define their own legal notice here.
billing.issuer_privacy_footer_inorme_fixed: This issuer uses INORME’s standard RGPD footer in the PDF (set by the system from the tax ID).
billing.issuer_privacy_footer_ph: Optional legal text at the bottom of the invoice PDF…
billing.series_desc: Each series belongs to one issuer: numbering is per issuer and series. Create series and enable or disable them as needed.
billing.new_draft_desc: Select client and series to create an editable draft.
billing.new_draft_due_hint: Default: 2 months after the invoice date. You can change it.
billing.new_draft_copy_lines_hint: Optional: reuse descriptions, quantities and tax lines from a previous invoice for this client (issued or draft). The header uses the issuer, series and dates you set above.
billing.new_draft_copy_lines_empty: No invoices with saved lines for this client. Create an empty draft or pick another client.
billing.drafts_group_hint: By issuer, year and month (planned date or creation). Collapse each level.
billing.issued_group_hint: By issuer, year and invoice month (per filters). Collapse each level.
billing.search_ph: Search by number, client, tax ID or notes
billing.invoice_date_hint_draft: Optional: historic invoices or another date. If empty, the issue date at emission time is used.
billing.invoice_addressee_hint: Options come from the client’s addressee text (use semicolons in the client record).
billing.col_billable_hours_pct_hint: Share of the quantity (e.g. hours) to bill. 100% = full amount. Line amount = quantity × unit price × this %.
billing.pdf_error_missing_traceability: Cannot generate the PDF: emission traceability data (QR) is missing. Reload the page or open the invoice again from the list.
billing.delete_draft_confirm: Delete this draft? This cannot be undone.
billing.draft_unsaved_desc: You have changed this draft (issuer, series, dates, notes or lines). If you continue without saving, those changes will be lost.
billing.delete_confirm_test_mode: Permanently delete this invoice and related receipts? (Testing only)

moduleActivation.title: Module activation
moduleActivation.subtitle: Enable or disable which modules each worker can access in backoffice.
moduleActivation.bulk_desc: Apply the same module configuration to multiple workers at once.
moduleActivation.search_placeholder: Search worker by name or email…

workerProfileRequests.title: Staff profile change requests
workerProfileRequests.subtitle: Workers can propose changes to their personal details. Approve to apply the suggested values to the staff record, or reject with a reason.
workerProfileRequests.reject_desc: The worker will see this reason in their history.
workerProfileRequests.toast_approved: Changes applied to the staff record.

intranet_alerts.clock_in_title: You have not clocked in yet
intranet_alerts.clock_in_desc: Today is a working day and there is no clock-in on record. Register it when you start your shift.
intranet_alerts.clock_out_desc: Your shift is still open (clock-in without clock-out). Clock out when you finish so the record is complete.
intranet_alerts.messages_desc: You have {{count}} new unread message(s). Check them so you do not miss notices or requests.
intranet_alerts.profile_desc: There is a pending profile change request. Open “My profile” to review it.
